Interface IMosaicDataset3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a mosaic dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("F1274BFF-32CC-4F6B-82AD-3A0864B70599")]
public interface IMosaicDataset3 : IMosaicDataset2, IMosaicDataset
